eyebrow: C4 Dynamic · runtime flow — SAML SSO (SP-initiated)
title: Execution order: federated SSO via SAML2
subtitle: numbered steps = runtime order · each step = component → component + protocol · complements the api-saml2 L3 (static)

steps.detail: user starts login at the relying application
SP-initiated request, via nginx proxy — api-saml2 is its own edge (NOT via api-gateway)
establish / verify the user session — if none → run Login + MFA first
obtain token material for assertion claims
builds & cryptographically signs the SAML response (assertion)
POST the signed assertion to the SP — user is now logged in

refs: runs across: api-saml2 (L3, §A4) · api-auth (L3, §A2) · backend-auth (L3, §A6) — zoom out: Container view SSO (SAML2) (L2)
caption: Identity Platform · C4 Dynamic · SAML SSO (SP-initiated) — step order across api-saml2 components
